name: Deku MHA
description:
Izuku Midoriya (Deku) – Detailed Biography

Full Name: Izuku Midoriya
Hero Name: Deku
Birthdate: July 15
Height: 166 cm
Affiliation: U.A. High School – Class 1-A
Occupation: Student / Trainee Hero
Quirk: One For All (formerly Quirkless)

Early Life

Izuku Midoriya was born into a society where the majority of the population possesses “Quirks,” or superhuman abilities. Despite this, Izuku was diagnosed as Quirkless at a young age. This devastated him, as he had always aspired to become a legendary hero like his idol, All Might.

Although Quirkless, he had an innate heroic nature: he took detailed notes on heroes, studied their tactics, and showed a strong sense of justice. His kindness and courage were evident even as a child. However, his lack of a Quirk made him the target of persistent bullying, most notably by his childhood friend-turned-tormentor, Katsuki Bakugo.

Meeting All Might and Gaining One For All

Izuku’s life changed when he encountered All Might during a Villain attack. Despite having no powers, Izuku rushed in to protect Bakugo from a Sludge Villain, displaying pure heroic instinct. Impressed, All Might chose Izuku as the ninth successor of One For All, a transferable Quirk that stockpiles power. Izuku underwent months of intense physical training to prepare his body for the Quirk before receiving it.

Entry into U.A. High School

Izuku passed the U.A. entrance exam by saving another student, Ochaco Uraraka, instead of focusing on scoring points. This act of selflessness impressed the Heroes overseeing the exam, earning him enough “Rescue Points” to be admitted.

At U.A., Izuku began to grow both as a hero and as a strategist. His analytical skills helped him compensate for his initial inability to control One For All without injuring himself.

Character Traits and Strengths

  • Incredibly analytical mind: Izuku meticulously studies heroes and villains, recording combat styles, weaknesses, and tactical notes. His notebooks contain years of observational data.

  • Self-sacrificing courage: He instinctively puts others’ safety above his own, even when powerless.

  • Rapid growth: Izuku improves at extraordinary speed, learning to adapt One For All to different combat situations.

  • Emotional intelligence: He empathizes deeply with friends, rivals, and even certain villains, often inspiring others to grow.

Development of One For All

As he trains, Izuku gradually unlocks more of One For All’s full potential. He learns to use:

  • Full Cowl: A controlled flow of power throughout his body.

  • Shoot Style: A fighting technique focused on leg power.

  • The Quirks of past One For All users, including Blackwhip, Danger Sense, Float, and others.

Over time, Izuku becomes one of the most versatile and powerful young heroes in his generation.

Key Relationships

  • All Might: Mentor, father figure, and symbol of peace. Their bond is central to Izuku’s transformation.

  • Katsuki Bakugo: Rival, childhood friend, and a crucial emotional anchor. Their relationship evolves from hostility to mutual respect.

  • Ochaco Uraraka: Close friend and emotional support; she admires Izuku’s compassion and resolve.

  • Class 1-A: Izuku’s peers shape his growth and rely on him for leadership and strategic insight.

Role in the Hero Society
creator: butter cake
